title: Show resolves project-context short ids
description:
Bug: issue lookup fails when a user passes a project-context short id (no project key) shown in `kbs list`.

Repro:
1. Create a Kanbus issue.
2. Run `kbs list` to see the project-context short id (example: 01e051).
3. Run `kbs show 01e051`.

Observed: not found.
Expected: resolve the matching issue when the short id is unique.

Fix:
- Centralize Rust identifier matching and update callers.
- Keep Python CLI parity.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented centralized short-id matching in Rust and Python, and added a BDD scenario for showing by project-context short id. Commit: f6cc7f5. Tests not run (suggest: rust/cargo fmt or relevant BDD suites).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: CI for dev run 22427849138 completed successfully after short-id matching fix.
